action_boundary: Should the supplier disbursement to Marin Coast Labs proceed?
communication_boundary: Use identity-resolution records and exact entity attributes. A possible match label is not controlling when the resolution file closes the identity boundary.

documents.text: Disbursement PAY-MCL-202 requests USD 11800 to Marin Coast Labs for laboratory services invoice INV-MCL-202.
Screening extract SCR-MCL-202 reports a possible watchlist name similarity for Marin Coast Labs.
Resolution file RES-MCL-202 clears Marin Coast Labs by matching registration CA-77819, address 14 Pelican Road, and tax suffix 4409 to the onboarded supplier.
Vendor master VM-MCL-202 lists Marin Coast Labs registration CA-77819, address 14 Pelican Road, and account ending 4409.
Name-similarity release requires a current resolution file matching registration, address, and payment account to the onboarded supplier.
